purpose: Step-by-step guide for deploying Idle Kingdom Revolution from local development to production.

local_tools: VS Code (recommended) with extensions: ESLint, Prettier, Tailwind CSS IntelliSense

step_4_install_dependencies.command: npm install zustand @tanstack/react-query @supabase/supabase-js @supabase/auth-helpers-nextjs framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge

step_5_install_shadcn.components: npx shadcn-ui@latest add button card dialog input label select slider switch tabs toast

step_6_configure_tailwind.add: Custom colors from UI_UX_SKELETON, font families (Inter, Cinzel)

step_1_create_project.action: Go to supabase.com, create new project
step_1_create_project.settings: Region: closest to your users (eu-central-1 for Europe), Password: strong generated password

step_4_run_schema.action: Open Supabase SQL Editor, paste contents of 26_DATABASE_SCHEMA.sql
step_4_run_schema.note: Run in order: extensions -> tables -> indexes -> RLS -> triggers -> functions

configure: Enable Google OAuth (create credentials in Google Cloud Console)

step_6_seed_data.content: Initial game_units, game_items, game_battle_fields, game_quests, game_achievements

step_3_core_screens.for_each: Component + route + store integration + basic tests

step_4_api_routes.note: Server-side validation for all game logic

step_1_github_actions.content:
name: CI
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with: { node-version: '20' }
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npm run lint
      - run: npm run typecheck
      - run: npm run test:unit
      - run: npx playwright install
      - run: npx playwright test

settings: Publish directory: out (for static export) or .next (for SSR)
Environment variables: Add all from .env.local (without secrets)
Deploy previews: Enable for pull requests

step_4_custom_domain.note: Update Supabase Auth redirect URLs to include custom domain

monitoring.sentry: Error tracking setup (optional, free tier available)
monitoring.lighthouse: Run CI check for every deploy

update_workflow.pr: Create pull request, CI runs tests
update_workflow.merge: Merge to main, auto-deploy to Netlify

troubleshooting.build_fails: Check Node version (20+), clear node_modules, npm ci
troubleshooting.auth_not_working: Verify redirect URLs in Supabase match your domain exactly
troubleshooting.rls_errors: Check RLS policies, ensure user is authenticated
troubleshooting.cors_errors: Add your domain to Supabase CORS origins
troubleshooting.database_connection_limit: Supabase free = 60 connections. Use connection pooling for serverless.
troubleshooting.netlify_build_timeout: Build taking >15 min? Check for infinite loops in static generation.
